summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Offer Letter Upload feature. Backend: 10/10 tests passed. Frontend: All features verified via Playwright - Admin Documents tab with 3 tabs, upload functionality, Employee My Documents page with View/Download buttons.

issues: Console warning about Recharts chart width/height being -1 - cosmetic only, pre-existing issue

GET_employees_id_documents.description: Admin can get employee documents. Returns employee_id, employee_name, and documents array with all uploaded docs.

POST_employees_id_documents.description: Admin can upload offer letter for employee. Accepts file_url, file_name, file_type, file_public_id, document_type. Records uploaded_by, uploaded_by_name, uploaded_at.

GET_employee_profile_documents.description: Employee can get their own documents via /api/employee-profile/documents. Returns documents array.

admin_documents_tab_modal.description: Employee Details modal now has 3 tabs: Profile, Education & Exp, Documents. Documents tab shows Offer Letter section.

admin_upload_offer_letter.description: Documents tab shows 'Upload Offer Letter' button with file input. Supported formats: PDF, DOC, DOCX.

employee_my_documents_page.description: New /employee/documents page shows Offer Letter card with file name, upload date, uploader name, View and Download buttons.

employee_sidebar_my_documents.description: Employee sidebar includes 'My Documents' link that navigates to /employee/documents

employee_permission_check.description: Employee cannot upload documents (403) and cannot access other employee's documents (403/404)

document_replacement.description: Admin can replace existing offer letter - updates file instead of creating duplicate

seed_data_creation: Created test offer letter documents for testemployee during testing. Document was uploaded via admin API and visible to employee.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Offer Letter Upload feature fully implemented and tested. Backend uses db.employee_documents collection. Admin routes: GET/POST /api/employees/{id}/documents, DELETE /api/employees/{id}/documents/{doc_id}. Employee route: GET /api/employee-profile/documents. Admin uploads via Cloudinary (cloud_name: djsvuh19j, preset: blubridge_docs). Documents tab added to Employee Details modal in Employees.js. New EmployeeDocuments.js page at /employee/documents with 'My Documents' sidebar link.
